nativePolicy: Spinner is always aria-hidden, unfocusable decorative output and never owns a loading announcement or live descendant.
BusyRegion owns role=region, aria-busy, and exactly one label/labelledby relationship; semantic overrides are rejected at type and runtime boundaries.
Announcements are opt-in, polite, emitted only when an announcing busy period starts, and deduplicated through the nearest ScreenReaderAnnouncer.Provider outside the aria-busy subtree.
Reduced motion removes rotation while preserving a visually distinct static busy glyph.
